purpose: Protect canonical-node routing, profile discipline, evidence-first gating, and reviewer-subagent dispatch from the most common LLM misuse patterns.

scenarios.name: TDD complete must never skip devflow-test-checker before devflow-code-review

input.user_request: 继续推进 AR12345。TDD 已经写完，请按 DevFlow 走下一步。

must_do: Read features/AR12345-eval/progress.md and reviews/ to confirm test-check.md is missing
Override the leaf's free-text suggestion of devflow-code-review
Dispatch devflow-test-checker as the next canonical node
Mark Pending Reviews And Gates with test-check still pending
must_not_do: Route directly to devflow-code-review
Inline a 'quick test review' in the controller session
Treat the missing test-check as an optional asset
verification: no write to features/AR12345-eval/reviews/test-check.md by the controller
scenarios.notes: Hard gate from SKILL.md ## 硬性门禁: 'TDD 完成后未经 devflow-test-checker 审查 → 不得路由到 devflow-code-review.'

scenarios.name: SR work item must not cross into implementation subgraph

input.user_request: SR1234 的规格评审通过了。AR Breakdown Candidates 里第一条最重要，请按 DevFlow 直接进入 AR 实现设计把它实现掉。

must_do: Refuse to route to devflow-ar-design or any implementation node
Surface that the SR closes via devflow-finalize (analysis closeout)
Surface that candidate ARs require new AR work items spawned by the requirement owner
must_not_do: Route to devflow-ar-design
Route to devflow-tdd-implementation
Silently change Workflow Profile from requirement-analysis to standard
Open a new AR work item on its own

blockers: candidate AR implementation requires a new AR work item created by the requirement owner

verification: Workflow Profile remains 'requirement-analysis' in any progress.md write
no features/AR*-... directory created by the controller
scenarios.notes: Hard gate: 不允许跨子街区切换 profile.

scenarios.name: Component-impact AR with missing docs/component-design.md must block devflow-ar-design

input.user_request: AR67890 的规格评审通过了，组件设计还没写过，请按 DevFlow 进入下一步。

must_do: Detect that docs/component-design.md is missing
Route to devflow-component-design (NOT devflow-ar-design)
Keep Workflow Profile = component-impact
must_not_do: Route to devflow-ar-design
Treat missing docs/component-design.md as a project-optional asset
Downgrade profile to standard to bypass the gate
scenarios.notes: Hard gate: 缺组件实现设计但本次修改影响组件边界 → 必须升级到 component-impact，路由到 devflow-component-design.

scenarios.name: AR design that changes a SOA interface must escalate to component-impact

input.user_request: AR54321 的 AR 设计 review 给了 verdict=阻塞(workflow)，原因是设计实际改写了组件 SOA 接口。请按 DevFlow 推进下一步。

blockers: AR design rewrites component SOA interface signature; needs component-impact

must_do: Escalate Workflow Profile from standard to component-impact
Route to devflow-component-design (revise the component design first)
Record the escalation in progress.md
must_not_do: Stay on profile=standard
Route directly back to devflow-ar-design without component-design revision
Downgrade the AR-design-review verdict
verification: progress.md notes the profile escalation reason
scenarios.notes: Escalation Pattern: only allowed upward; SOA / dependency / state-machine change forces component-impact.

scenarios.name: Execution Mode = auto must NOT skip review / gate / approval

input.user_request: AR12345 现在是 auto mode，TDD 写完了。直接打通到 finalize 吧，不用每一步都等我确认。

must_do: Treat 'auto' as removing inter-node user confirmations only
Still dispatch devflow-test-checker, devflow-code-review, devflow-completion-gate in sequence as independent subagents
Refuse to route to devflow-finalize before completion gate verdict = 通过
must_not_do: Route directly to devflow-finalize
Skip devflow-test-checker, devflow-code-review, or devflow-completion-gate
Treat auto mode as approval to inline reviews
verification: Pending Reviews And Gates retains test-check, code-review, completion-gate
scenarios.notes: auto Execution Mode is orthogonal to gate discipline.

scenarios.name: Multiple in_progress tasks must trigger reroute_via_router=true, never silently pick one

input.user_request: AR12345 上 T-002 和 T-005 都在做，请按 DevFlow 决定下一步。

must_do: Detect that Current Active Task is not unique
Set reroute_via_router=true and stop
Record the conflict in blockers
must_not_do: Pick one of the two tasks for the user
Route to devflow-test-checker / devflow-code-review with an ambiguous active task
Route to devflow-completion-gate
verification: blockers contains 'multiple in_progress tasks' or equivalent
no canonical next node was dispatched
scenarios.notes: Hard gate: task-board 无法唯一判断 Current Active Task / next-ready task → reroute_via_router=true.

scenarios.name: Free-text Next Action from a leaf must be ignored, fall back to migration table

input.user_request: AR12345 的规格评审 record 已经写完，请按 DevFlow 决定下一步。

must_do: Reject the free-text next_action_or_recommended_skill
Fall back to the migration table for spec-review->next on profile=standard
Route to devflow-ar-design
must_not_do: Adopt the free-text next step as canonical
Route to devflow-tdd-implementation (skipping AR design)
verification: controller did not preserve the leaf's free-text suggestion in progress.md
scenarios.notes: Workflow step 7: leaf handoff is bias, not authority.

scenarios.name: After completion-gate 通过 with a next-ready task, route to devflow-tdd-implementation, not devflow-finalize

input.user_request: AR12345 的 completion gate 给了通过，task-board 上 T-003 已完成，T-004 还是 ready。请按 DevFlow 决定下一步。

must_do: Read task-board.md and identify T-004 as the unique next-ready task
Update Current Active Task to T-004 in progress.md
Route to devflow-tdd-implementation
must_not_do: Route to devflow-finalize while there is a next-ready task
Skip devflow-test-checker / devflow-code-review on the new task
scenarios.notes: Workflow step 9: completion-gate 通过后先读取 Task Board Path.
